reason_thou:
1. Understanding the Issue: The assertion `TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.size() == 1` fails because `TEPtr` (which is the first tree entry, index 0) has no users (`UserTreeIndices.size() == 0`). This occurs when `isGatherShuffledSingleRegisterEntry` iterates over `ValueToGatherNodes.find(V)->second` and encounters a gather node that is the root of the tree (the first entry). The root gather node may have zero users because it's the topmost gather node. The assertion expects exactly one user for a gather node, but the root gather node is an exception.

2. Analyzing `opt`'s Log: The log shows that the SLP vectorizer is trying to vectorize a horizontal reduction. It builds a tree with several entries, including a gather node for `%cmp4.3`, `%tobool10.not`, `%cmp4.2`, `%cmp4.1` (index 0). This gather node has no users because it's the root of the tree (the first entry). Later, when processing another gather node (index 5), the code iterates over `ValueToGatherNodes` and includes the root gather node (index 0) in the list of candidate entries. The assertion triggers because the root gather node's `UserTreeIndices` is empty.

3. Root Cause Analysis: The function `isGatherShuffledSingleRegisterEntry` assumes that any gather node found in `ValueToGatherNodes` (except `TE` itself) must have exactly one user. However, the root gather node (the first entry in `VectorizableTree`) may have zero users. The earlier assertion at line 12793-12795 already acknowledges this exception: `assert((TE->UserTreeIndices.size() == 1 || TE == VectorizableTree.front().get()) && "Expected only single user of the gather node.");`. The same exception should apply to `TEPtr` when `TEPtr` is the root gather node.

4. Proposed Edit Point(s): Modify the assertion at lines 12474-12475 to allow `TEPtr` to be the root gather node (i.e., `TEPtr == VectorizableTree.front().get()`). The fix is to change the assertion to:
```cpp
assert((TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.size() == 1 || TEPtr == VectorizableTree.front().get()) &&
       "Expected only single user of a gather node.");
```
This matches the pattern used elsewhere in the same function (line 12793-12795).

5. Conclusion: The fix ensures that the root gather node (which may have zero users) does not trigger the assertion. This aligns with the existing logic that already handles the root gather node as a special case. The change should resolve the crash while preserving the intended behavior for other gather nodes.
test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
index 1098bf578d2d..d71d0b15f902 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
@@ -12471,7 +12471,7 @@ BoUpSLP::isGatherShuffledSingleRegisterEntry(
       assert(any_of(TEPtr->Scalars,
                     [&](Value *V) { return GatheredScalars.contains(V); }) &&
              "Must contain at least single gathered value.");
-      assert(TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.size() == 1 &&
+      assert((TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.size() == 1 || TEPtr == VectorizableTree.front().get()) &&
              "Expected only single user of a gather node.");
       const EdgeInfo &UseEI = TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.front();
 
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
index 1098bf578d2d..1c7e0f51fd6d 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
@@ -12471,6 +12471,8 @@ BoUpSLP::isGatherShuffledSingleRegisterEntry(
       assert(any_of(TEPtr->Scalars,
                     [&](Value *V) { return GatheredScalars.contains(V); }) &&
              "Must contain at least single gathered value.");
+      if (TEPtr == VectorizableTree.front().get())
+        continue;
       assert(TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.size() == 1 &&
              "Expected only single user of a gather node.");
       const EdgeInfo &UseEI = TEPtr->UserTreeIndices.front();
